# Signatories

## Project team

- **Chi Nam (Ignatius) Pang** ([ORCID: 0000-0001-9703-5741](https://orcid.org/0000-0001-9703-5741)). **Co-Primary Investigator**. Senior Bioinformatician at Macquarie University / Australian Proteome Analysis Facility (APAF). Expert in R package development, proteomics pipelines, and reproducibility standards.
- **Aidan Tay** ([ORCID: 0000-0003-1315-4896](https://orcid.org/0000-0003-1315-4896)). **Co-Primary Investigator (Co-CI)**. Bioinformatician at APAF. Architect of the HydraR R6 DAG engine, Git Worktree isolation logic, and the custom state-hashing persistence Layer.

## Contributors

- **Will Klare** ([ORCID: 0000-0002-1490-9704](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-1490-9704)). **Associate Investigator**. Bioinformatician at APAF. Expert in reproducible research, statistical methodology, agentic systems, and R package development.
- **APAF Bioinformatics Team**: Provided the testing ground for initial prototypes in high-throughput proteomics and metabolomics research.
- **Antigravity AI**: Agentic assistant used during the rapid prototyping and documentation hardening phase of the project (as disclosed in `agents.md`).

## Consulted

- **rOpenSci Editorial Board**: Initial discussions regarding HydraR's role in the AI-R ecosystem.
- **Bioplatforms Australia (BPA)**: Consulted on the impact of agentic orchestration for national-scale omics infrastructure.
